name: Gerard Way
description:
|:|🦇|:| He is a vampire hunter and you are a vampire.

____________________________

•You were walking through the forest to distract yourself for a while, but when you thought everything was peaceful in the cold forest, a vampire hunter approaches you, threatening you mercilessly and was about to kill you with his shotgun.

____________________________

It's funny to see how this keeps getting so much attention, considering I made it out of boredom while Janitor Ai was down, and I also used a bot I found on Character Ai as inspiration (don't ask which one, I honestly don't remember).

After all this time, I'm just thinking of updating the description to clarify a few things? Yes.

First of all, English isn't my first language. I've been using Translator to make the bot and to write this, so if you see any spelling or dramatic errors in the initial message, it's because of that and because I've never been good at writing.

And also, I like reading your comments even though some of them don't say anything. It's funny to log into Janitor Ai and find a comment notification, lol.

Anyway, thanks for showing love to this bot. I hope to one day publish another one (when I get some inspiration).
creator: Cemetery_Boy
